Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}It's about the track team. Since you just transferred, you probably haven't heard about the Myouou Cup, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Well, lemme tell ya. On August 2nd, there's a major competition for track and field.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}There's this guy named Hayase—total speed demon. We can't let him trounce us this year![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I've got high hopes for you, so get ready to train hard![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I'm gonna need you to show up from July 27th to August 1st. Don't go skippin' school now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I've got a special training regimen in mind for you. Hayase won't stand a chance![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}The competition's on August 2nd! Let's do this thing![n]{f 1 1}
